description_long: This is a white bust sculpture depicting a bearded male figure with classical features, including a prominent brow, deep-set eyes, and a full beard. The bust is mounted on a rectangular pedestal base, and the shoulders are broad with a stylized, angular cut. The surface appears smooth and matte, with subtle shadowing accentuating the facial details and contours. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, focusing on the general shape of the head and shoulders. The overall form suggests a traditional or neoclassical style, commonly found in public spaces or cultural institutions.
description: A white bust sculpture of a bearded man with classical features, mounted on a rectangular pedestal and finished with a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: Side profile of the bust, showing the prominent nose, brow, and the angular cut of the shoulders.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the detailed facial features, full beard, and symmetrical shoulders.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the features seen in view 0 with similar angular shoulder cuts.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back of the head and broad shoulders with minimal detail.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate a specific setting.
